Variables.Name: TargetBone
Variables.Description: Target Bone this is constraint to

Variables.Name: OffsetOption
Variables.Description:
Maintain offset based on refpose or not.
	  
	  None - no offset
	  Offset_RefPose - offset is created based on reference pose
	  
	  In the future, we'd like to support custom offset, not just based on ref pose

Variables.Name: TransformType
Variables.Description: What transform type is constraint to - Translation, Rotation, Scale OR Parent. Parent overrides all component

Variables.Name: PerAxis
Variables.Description: Per axis filter options - applied in their local space not in world space
